Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 4.desc_ar: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

beIN 4K.desc_ar: Wolves have lost 17 of their last 18 Premier League matches against Liverpool, winning the other 3-0 in February 2023 at Molineux under Julen Lopetegui. Liverpool have won 83% of their Premier League games against Wolves, winning 19 of 23 games  – that is the best win ratio of any side to face another 20+ times in the competition’s history.

beIN 4K.title_en: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_fr: Newcastle United contre Manchester United - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_ar: Bruno Fernandes has 13 Premier League assists this season, the most by a Manchester United player in a single campaign since Antonio Valencia in 2011-12. Only David Beckham in 1999-00  and Nani in 2010-11  have ever provided more in a single campaign in the competition for the club. Having failed to register a goal involvement in any of his first 15 Premier League appearances for Newcastle, Jacob Ramsey has now either scored  or assisted  in each of his last three. He’s never scored or assisted in four consecutive league games before.

They have never won consecutive away league games against Spurs.
